description: Visual Studio 2022 is open with the 'InventorySystem' solution. The application currently has a tightly coupled architecture where the business logic (Inventory.Core) directly references and instantiates database classes (Inventory.Data). Refactor the solution to follow the Dependency Inversion Principle by moving the Order.cs entity and a new IOrderRepository interface (extracted from SqlOrderRepository.cs) into the Inventory.Core project. Invert the project references so Inventory.Data depends on Inventory.Core and remove the dependency of Inventory.Core on Inventory.Data. Refactor OrderProcessor.cs to use constructor injection for IOrderRepository instead of direct instantiation, and register the service in the DI container within Inventory.UI/Program.cs. The final solution must compile without errors.
